subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that He is the All-Powerful, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. He hath appeared and made manifest whatsoever He hath willed. Naught escapeth His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه هو المقتدر المهیمن القیوم قد ظهر و اظهر ما اراد لایعزب عن علمه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
